title: cynoglossum rechingeri
intro: Cynoglossum rechingeri, also known as Rechinger's hound's tongue, is a species of flowering plant in the borage family (Boraginaceae). It is primarily used in traditional medicine, particularly in the Himalayan region, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Cynoglossum rechingeri include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
